PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $proc" } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 5173" })
